title: Party Chat
opening: Hi there! How's your evening going?

t1.prompt: Hi there! How's your evening going?
t1.promptTranslation: Hi there! (Hai thair! — Hello!) How's your evening going? (Hauz yoor eev-ning goh-ing? — How is your night?)

t2_chat.prompt: That's good to hear! Are you enjoying the party? Or perhaps you have interesting plans for the weekend?
t2_chat.promptTranslation: That's good to hear! (Thats good too heer! — I'm happy for you!) Are you enjoying the party? Or perhaps you have interesting plans for the weekend?

t3_food_movies.prompt: That sounds fun! The food here is quite good, isn't it? Or maybe you've seen any good movies lately?
t3_food_movies.promptTranslation: That sounds fun! (That soundz fun! — That sounds nice!) The food here is quite good, isn't it? (Thee food heer iz kwaiet good, iz-int it? — Food is tasty!) Or maybe you've seen any good movies lately?

t4_wrap_up.prompt: That sounds interesting! Well, it was really nice talking to you. I should go get another drink.
t4_wrap_up.promptTranslation: That sounds interesting! (That soundz in-ter-est-ing! — That is good to know!) Well, it was really nice talking to you. I should go get another drink.

t-repeat.prompt: Sorry, I didn't catch that. Could you please say that again?
t-repeat.promptTranslation: Sorry, I didn't catch that. (Sor-ee, Ai did-int katch that! — Please repeat.) Could you please say that again?

t-end.prompt: It was great chatting with you! Enjoy the rest of the party. Goodbye!
t-end.promptTranslation: It was great chatting with you! (It wuz grayt chat-ing with yoo! — Nice talk.) Enjoy the rest of the party. Goodbye!
